---
pagetitle: "Publications"
description: "Op-eds, commentaries, research papers, and working papers by Anushka Saxena on Chinese military affairs, Indo-Pacific geopolitics, and India's foreign policy."
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-hero">
  <div class="section-label">Research &amp; Writing</div>
  <h1>Publications</h1>
  <p>Opinions, commentaries, research papers, and working papers on Chinese military affairs, Indo-Pacific geopolitics, and India's foreign policy.</p>
</header>

<section class="as-section">
  <div class="as-container">
    <div class="section-label">Op-eds &amp; Commentary</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Short-Form</h2>
    <div class="gold-divider"></div>
    <div class="as-filter">
      <span>&#128269;</span>
      <input type="text" data-filter="short-form-list" placeholder="Filter short-form articles…">
    </div>
```

{{< include _includes/shortform.html >}}

```{=html}
  </div>
</section>

<section class="as-section as-section-alt">
  <div class="as-container">
    <div class="section-label">Papers &amp; Chapters</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Long-Form</h2>
    <div class="gold-divider"></div>
    <div class="as-filter">
      <span>&#128269;</span>
      <input type="text" data-filter="long-form-list" placeholder="Filter research papers…">
    </div>
```

{{< include _includes/longform.html >}}

```{=html}
  </div>
</section>
<script src="site.js"></script>
```
